reviews.name: 전****
reviews.content:
강경 건식파라 습식은 먹는게 거의 없고 츄르도 조금만 뭐가 마음에 안들면 바로 안먹는애에요
갑기항 판정을 받고 하루 두번 약을 꼬박꼬박 먹어야되서 약 줄때마다 츄르를 주게 되었어요 이나바 챠오츄르를 엄청 좋아해서 그것만 사 두었었는데 기존에 가~끔 간식으로 줄 땐 생각없이 줬지만 매일 츄르를 먹게 되다보니 좀 더 건강하고 국산제품으로 먹이고 싶더라구요ㅎㅎ 그래서 검색해보다가 바잇미에서 츄르를 사보게 되었어요 

바잇미는 서플리츄든 이 헤어볼 츄르든 기호성이 진짜 미쳤네요... 먹을때 혀 속도가 다른 츄르들과는 달라요 저희집 애는 이나바 츄르 먹을때보다 더 열심히 빨리 먹어요 ㅋㅋㅋ 조공 츄르들도 안먹는애라 사실 사면서도 긴가민가 했었거든요 14g짜리 츄르는 아침 저녁 두번에 나눠서 급여했는데 이건 한 스틱에 7g이라 굳이 나눠서 급여할 필요도 없어서 편합니당 ㅋㅋ 

바로 30개들이 3팩 세트 저렴하게 구매 하였습니다 자주자주 행사 해 주세용!!!!
reviews.content_en:
My cat is very picky - she barely eats dry or wet food, and only nibbles on treats. If something doesn't suit her taste, she won't eat it at all. After being diagnosed with a condition requiring twice-daily medication, I started giving her treats every time I give medicine. She absolutely loved INABA Chao Churu, so I only bought that at first. But since she's now eating treats every day instead of just occasionally, I wanted to feed her something healthier and domestically produced. So I searched around and decided to try BITE ME treats!

BITE ME's palatability is seriously crazy - whether it's the supplement churu or this hairball churu... The way she licks it is completely different from other treats! My cat eats it much faster and more eagerly than when she ate INABA churu 😄 Since my picky eater doesn't even eat other brands' treats, I was honestly unsure about buying this, but honestly I'm glad I did. The 14g treats required dividing into two servings, but since these are 7g per stick, you don't need to divide them - super convenient! 😄

I purchased the 30-pack set (3 packs) at a great price. Please run sales frequently!!!

🧡냥사원 솔직리뷰🧡

나는 정~~말 다른 친구들보다 그루밍을 꼼꼼히 한다고 자부하는 고양이야! 사실 내가 맨날 털 열심히 먹어서 약간 굿똥이 좀 어렵고,,, 가끔 토도 해서 우리 누나랑 엄마가 온갖 영양제니 뭐니 나한테 먹으라고 했지만 고양이로서 그거 진짜 절대 용서 못하는거, 알지? 맨날맨날 전쟁이었는데, 데일리 케어 헤어볼! 이거는 엄마가 해주는 닭가슴살 특식 맛이었어! 진짜 대박... 츄르는 까기 전에 입에 대는거 아닌데, 나도 모르게 입이 간다... 이렇게 맛있는게 내 몸에도 좋다니까..어쩌겠어. 냥존심 좀 상해도 먹어야지 쩝. 7kg의 듬직함을 가진 나 같은 왕냥이들도 맘 놓고 먹을 수 있는 칼로리니까, 다들 나 최티모 믿고 먹어봐! 한 달 뒤, 새로운 리뷰로 찾아올게!
reviews.content_en:
🧡Cat Employee Honest Review🧡
Hey! I'm Choi Timo, the best cat employee!
I pride myself on grooming more thoroughly than other kitties! Honestly, I eat fur so much that sometimes poops are a bit difficult, and I throw up occasionally... so my sister and mom kept trying to make me eat all sorts of supplements and stuff, but you know, that's something we cats absolutely can't forgive, right? It was a daily war, but then... Daily Care Hairball! This tastes like the special chicken breast snack mom gives me! Seriously amazing... I don't usually go for treats before opening them, but I find myself drawn to this... If it's this delicious AND good for my body... what can I do? My cat pride is a bit hurt, but I gotta eat it, yum. Even for a majestic 7kg fluffball like me, the calorie count is safe, so trust me, Choi Timo, and give it a try! I'll come back with a new review in a month!

reviews.content_en:
My cat absolutely loves it and eats it so well.
I was worried since she's picky, but she seems to have great palatability.
It was so hard to find a treat with good ingredients AND good taste ㅠ

It's been about 2 weeks of daily feeding,
and the ingredients that help with hairballs seem to also help with digestion.
My cat has completely stopped the food vomiting and water vomiting she used to do. Of course, I need to keep monitoring, but it seems to be thanks to the ingredients that help digestion, including psyllium husk and probiotics ㅎㅎ

When I used to sift through her food vomit, I'd find fur,
so I started feeding this to prevent hairball vomiting.
I'd recommend this to anyone else with the same concerns ㅎㅎ

reviews.content: 헤어볼 츄르는 막둥이 때문에 떨어지지않게 항상 구매해둡니다. 할인 이벤트해서 좀 더 저렴하게 잘 샀네요. 믹둥이가 헤어볼을 대변으로 흡수를 못하는건지 항상 털갈이 시기에 헤어볼을 토해놓더군요. 각종 사료와 빗질, 영양제 다 해봤는데 효과도 없었고 츄르 형식의 헤어볼을 꾸준히 먹이니 어는 정도 괜찮아졌습니다. 이 헤어볼 츄르를 거부감없이 아주 잘 먹는데 이것 때문인지는 모르겠지만 효과는 있는 것 같아서 계속 먹일 생각입니다.
reviews.content_en: I always keep hairball chews stocked because of my youngest one. I got a good deal with a discount event. My middle cat doesn't seem to absorb hairballs through bowel movements - he'd always throw up hairballs during shedding season. I tried all kinds of food, brushing, and supplements but nothing worked. Once I started consistently feeding him hairball chews, things got better to some degree. He eats this hairball chew without any hesitation, and I'm not sure if it's because of this, but it seems to be effective so I plan to keep feeding it to him.

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 바잇미 이벤트로 먼저 체험해봤던 제품인데 너무 좋아서 내돈내산 재구매했어요✌️ 우선 용량이 7g이라 처음엔 좀 양이 작지않나 생각했는데 매일 먹이기에 부담없고 오히려 츄르 하나는 다 못먹는 고양이라서 적당한 양이라 너무 좋았습니다ㅠㅠ 유산균을 꼭 급여해야 하는데 매일 츄르에 주려니 좀 그렇더라구요 근데 이거는 헤어볼 영양제라서 맘 편하게 줄 수 있고 무엇보다 기호성이 미쳤어요. 저희집 고양이는 입맛이 진짜 까다로워서 팽당한 츄르도 엄청 많은데 이건 뭘 넣으셨는지 모르겠지만 진짜 너무 잘먹습니다ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ 두달 째 급여 중인데 이거 먹는 동안 급하게 먹어서 두번 정도 토했는데 전에는 헤어볼도 섞여나오더니 이번엔 아예 없어서 너무 신기했어요👍
reviews.content_en: This was a product I first tried through a BITE ME event and loved it so much that I bought it again with my own money ✌️ At first, I thought the 7g amount seemed a bit small for daily feeding, but it's actually perfect without being burdensome, and since my cat doesn't finish a whole chew anyway, it was just right for her ㅠㅠ I really need to give probiotics daily, but putting them in chews every day seemed like a hassle. But this is a hairball supplement so I can give it with peace of mind, and above all, the palatability is crazy. My cat has really picky taste and I end up throwing away a lot of chews, but I don't know what they put in this - she eats it so well ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ I've been feeding it for two months now and when she ate too quickly she threw up twice, but before there would be hairballs mixed in, and this time there was nothing at all - it was so amazing 👍

Monzi's Daily Care Hairball contains psyllium husk, chitosan, and dietary fiber from elm bark, so I thought... oh, it's not just named a supplement - they actually know what they're doing 🤭 These are ingredients I've heard about when searching for hairball solutions, and they're all included thoughtfully. It's good that only necessary ingredients are included, because my Pepper has allergies and I can't feed her treats with tons of random ingredients. Even though larger amounts cause diarrhea, this is only 7g per serving, which is great! Most importantly, unlike other supplements, there's no process of breaking apart pills to adjust amount or mixing into wet food ㅡ ⭐️ Just feed one packet a day and you're done! For Pepper, I replaced her regular reward treat with Monzi's Daily Care Hairball after ear cleaning, and it's perfect. We're on the 10th day of feeding it, and she hasn't thrown up once 😼 Since the 7-pack version is now available, you can try smaller amounts first! If you're looking for a convenient and tasty hairball supplement, I recommend it!

깔끔쟁이라 그루밍을 꼼꼼히 하다보니 먹는 털도 어마어마할거 같더라구요
그러던 중에 한달에 1-2번 하던 헤어볼토를 매주 하는걸 보고 헤어볼케어를 해볼까하다가도 입맛이 너무 까다로워서 겁내던 차에 체험해보게 되었어요!!  일주일 체험후기예요!

기호성!
순자의 까다로운 입맛에 두근되었으나 빵꾸를 내가며 먹는걸 보면 말 다했쥬 최고,,
헤어볼케어 효과!
일주일마다 헤어볼 토를 하고 있었는데 웬걸 열흘째 말짱한걸보니 효과가 있어서 엄청 대만족 중이예요! 

이후 내돈내산으로 꾸준히 먹일 예정이예요!
퇴근 후 보상처럼 물에 섞어주면 음수량도 채우고 일석삼조!
reviews.content_en:
Sunja is a long-haired cat going through her first major shedding season after reaching adulthood. Even when I brush her daily with just my fist, she sheds an insane amount, and since she's a neat freak who grooms thoroughly, I was worried about all the hair she'd ingest. She went from throwing up hairballs 1-2 times a month to doing it weekly, so I thought about trying hairball care, but I was hesitant because she's so picky. Then I got a chance to try it! Here's my review after a week!

Palate appeal!
I was nervous about Sunja's picky taste, but watching her eat it eagerly with big bites says it all - it's amazing,, 🤩
Hairball care effectiveness!
She was throwing up hairballs every week, but at the one-week mark she was completely fine! The results are amazing and I'm super satisfied! ✨

I'm planning to buy this myself and keep feeding it to her from now on!
Mixing it with water after work as a reward kills three birds with one stone - she gets the treat, hydration, and hairball care! 💧

reviews.content:

The single-serving portions are just right and it's low-calorie, so it's perfect for giving as a treat ㅎㅎ

reviews.content: 기호성 좋다는 이바나 츄르도 잘안먹는 까탈스러운 냥이이인데 이건먹어서 샀어요ㅋ 7일분 한번 사봤더니 먹더라구요~지금도 간식으로 주고있구요 양도 적당하고 털 뿜뿜인데 토도 안하고 아주 만족스럽네요~세일만 자주해주시길ㅎㅎ  다만 액체라서 이를 잘 닦아줘야겠어요:)
reviews.content_en: My cat is so picky that even popular treats like BITE ME chews don't interest her, but she eats this one! 😻 I bought a 7-day pack and she actually ate it, and now I give it to her as a regular treat. The portion size is perfect and even though she sheds like crazy, she hasn't been throwing up at all - I'm very satisfied~! I hope you do sales more often ㅎㅎ Just need to make sure to brush her teeth well since it's liquid :)

reviews.content:

털이 날릴정도인데 아이들 그루밍하면서 삼켜질 털을 생각하니. 어후..

다 먹어서 먼지 데일리케어 헤어볼 구입해봤어요

안생긴다고 하니..앞으로 꾸준하게 먼지랑 함께 관리하려고 합니다!!
reviews.content_en:
My babies' daily hairball care is officially MUNZI from now on!!
With the season changing, the kids seem to know it too - our place is covered in fur~! 😹
With all that shedding, thinking about the hair they ingest while grooming... ugh..
I used to give other daily hairball care products before, but they ran out, so I bought MUNZI's daily care hairball product!
Since we have three cats, I tested it first by buying 7 packs.
It would've been a waste if they didn't eat it.. ㅜ.ㅜㅋ
Fortunately, all three of my kitties love it so much! 🐱🐱🐱
The 7g single serving is just the right amount to eat at once~ and it's low-calorie too, so amazing~~!!
I heard that hairball management is crucial to prevent health issues in cats..
So I'm planning to consistently manage their hairballs with MUNZI from now on!! 💪

reviews.content:
중장모인 울냥님 헤어볼을 항상 신경쓰는데 요걸로 픽했어요~ 먹이기 편하고 츄르처럼 한개씩 먹어요~ 우선 거부감 없이 달라고 기다립니다~ 4개월치 사서 먹기시작했는데 젤형이 생각보다 묽고 양이 조금 작아서 저에겐 좋았어요~ 츄르같은 간식느낌이 아니라 영양제 느낌~
고양이의 숙명 헤어볼에서 자유해지는 물건(?)이 될것같은 느낌~~ 정착될듯합니다~ 열심히 먹일께요
reviews.content_en:
I'm always concerned about my long-haired cat's hairballs, so I chose this~ It's easy to feed and she eats it one at a time like a chew treat~ First of all, she shows no hesitation and eagerly asks for more~ I bought a 4-month supply and started feeding it, and the gel texture is thinner than I expected with a slightly smaller portion, which actually works great for me~ It has more of a supplement feel rather than a treat like regular chews~
It feels like it could be the one thing(?) that frees my cat from the inevitable fate of hairballs~~ I think it's going to stick~ I'll feed it to her diligently! 💕

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 입맛 까다로운 우엉이가 처음부터 잘 먹었던 츄르! 최근 들어 안하던 헤어볼 토를 하기 시작해서, 예전에 구매했던 제품이 생각나 들어왔더니 마침 할인행사 중이라 운좋게 저렴히 구매했네여. 헤어볼 토를 하고 난 뒤로 이걸 매일 급여하고 난 뒤론 기분 탓인지 토를 좀 덜 하는 것 같기두 하고요..! 일단 꾸준히 급여해볼 생각입니다. 효과 좋으면 계속 구매 할 생각이고요. 일단 입 짧은 애가 잘 먹어주는 것만으로도 좋은 것 🫶
reviews.content_en: This is a treat that Ueong, who's very picky about food, ate well from the first time! If it works well, I'll keep buying it. But honestly, the fact that my picky eater finishes it is already worth it 🫶

reviews.content_en:
My cat is SUPER picky! 😹

I followed her around trying to give it to her, but she ran away!
Then I smudged a tiny bit on her nose and she tasted it, and then she came after me! 🐾
